case_title: THE TIDES CENTER VS. DOROTHY CHAMBERS ET AL

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE TIDES CENTER A CALIFORNIA NON-PROFIT PUBLIC BENEFIT CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHAMBERS, DOROTHY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 481 MINNA STREET #123, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103, LEASE FORFEITED, **INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE TIDES CENTER A CALIFORNIA NON-PROFIT PUBLIC BENEFIT CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT CHAMBERS, DOROTHY DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
